evaluators.name: Beginner Safety Favorites Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user favorited at least three beginner-level safety_basics articles with read time ≤ 8 minutes and rating ≥ 4.0.

evaluators.name: Pontoon Day Trip Checklist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user saved progress on the pontoon day trip checklist and marked the first five items as completed.

evaluators.name: Boat Capacity Trip Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user calculated capacity for an ~18×7 ft open motorboat on inland water and saved that calculation into a trip plan for 6 passengers.

evaluators.name: Newest Thunderstorm Emergency Print View Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user opened the print view for the newest qualifying thunderstorm emergency article for boats up to 26 ft, published from 2022 onward.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Basic Safety Course Training Plan Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the cheapest qualifying basic boating safety beginner course (≤$100, ≤25 miles) to their training plan with a June 2024 start month.

evaluators.name: Monthly 2-Stroke Saltwater Maintenance Schedule Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user generated and saved a monthly engine maintenance schedule for a 2-stroke outboard used monthly in saltwater starting in July 2024.

evaluators.name: Three-Step Night Boating Learning Path Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the learning path contains one night navigation step, one beginner anchoring step, and one VHF radio step from the three distinct how-to categories.

evaluators.name: Radio Distress Calls Study List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added three radio distress call glossary terms to their Study List.
